sentences.target: Das Orchester spielt heute im Park.

translations.de: Das Orchester spielt heute im Park.
translations.en: The orchestra is playing in the park today.
translations.es: La orquesta toca hoy en el parque.
translations.fr: L'orchestre joue dans le parc aujourd'hui.
translations.yue: 管弦樂團今日喺公園表演。
translations.pt: A orquestra toca hoje no parque.
translations.vi: Hôm nay dàn nhạc biểu diễn ở công viên.
translations.nl: Het orkest speelt vandaag in het park.
translations.hu: A zenekar ma a parkban játszik.
translations.hi: आज ऑर्केस्ट्रा पार्क में संगीत बजा रहा है.
translations.el: Η ορχήστρα παίζει σήμερα στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Orkesteret spiller i parken i dag.
translations.id: Orkes bermain di taman hari ini.
translations.da: Orkestret spiller i parken i dag.
translations.ja: オーケストラは今日、公園で演奏しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter, determiner of the subject 'Orchester'.
Common noun, neuter singular; subject of the finite verb 'spielt'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative indicating location.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Ich höre das Orchester vom Balkon.

translations.de: Ich höre das Orchester vom Balkon.
translations.en: I can hear the orchestra from the balcony.
translations.es: Puedo oír la orquesta desde el balcón.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在阳台上能听到乐团的演奏。
translations.yue: 我喺陽台聽到管弦樂團嘅演奏。
translations.pt: Consigo ouvir a orquestra da varanda.
translations.vi: Tôi nghe được dàn nhạc từ ban công.
translations.nl: Vanaf het balkon hoor ik het orkest.
translations.hi: बालकनी से ऑर्केस्ट्रा की आवाज़ सुनाई देती है.
translations.el: Ακούω την ορχήστρα από το μπαλκόνι.
translations.nb: Fra balkongen kan jeg høre orkesteret.
translations.id: Dari balkon aku bisa mendengar orkes.
translations.sv: Från balkongen kan jag höra orkestern.
translations.da: Fra altanen kan jeg høre orkestret.
translations.ja: バルコニーからオーケストラの音が聞こえます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'höre'.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main predicate.
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Orchester'.
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'höre'.
Contraction of 'von' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative, indicates source/location.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of 'vom'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester spielt im Orchester die Geige.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ʃpiːlt ɪm ɔʁˈkɛstɐ diː ˈgaɪ̯gə/

translations.de: Meine Schwester spielt im Orchester die Geige.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ʃpiːlt ɪm ɔʁˈkɛstɐ diː ˈgaɪ̯gə/
translations.en: My sister plays the violin in the orchestra.
translations.es: Mi hermana toca el violín en la orquesta.
translations.fr: Ma sœur joue du violon dans l'orchestre.
translations.it: Mia sorella suona il violino nell'orchestra.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹在乐团里拉小提琴。
translations.yue: 我妹妹喺管弦樂團拉小提琴。
translations.ru: Моя сестра играет на скрипке в оркестре.
translations.pt: Minha irmã toca violino na orquestra.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi chơi violin trong dàn nhạc.
translations.nl: Mijn zus speelt viool in het orkest.
translations.uk: Моя сестра грає на скрипці в оркестрі.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन ऑर्केस्ट्रा में वायलिन बजाती है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra gra na skrzypcach w orkiestrze.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου παίζει βιολί στην ορχήστρα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min spiller fiolin i orkesteret.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya bermain biola di orkes.
translations.sv: Min syster spelar fiol i orkestern.
translations.ro: Sora mea cântă la vioară în orchestră.
translations.cs: Má sestra hraje v orchestru na housle.
translations.da: Min søster spiller violin i orkestret.
translations.ja: 私の妹はオーケストラでバイオリンを弾いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative singular feminine; agrees with 'Schwester'.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of 'spielt'.

Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative indicating location.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'im'.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Geige'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'spielt'.

translations.en: We are sitting close to the orchestra.
translations.es: Estamos sentados cerca de la orquesta.
translations.fr: Nous sommes assis près de l'orchestre.
translations.yue: 我哋坐喺管弦樂團附近。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ngồi gần dàn nhạc.
translations.nl: We zitten dicht bij het orkest.
translations.hi: हम ऑर्केस्ट्रा के पास बैठे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちはオーケストラの近くに座っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of 'sitzen'.
